sentences.arabic: يُزَيِّنُ النَّاسُ بُيُوتَهُمْ بِالفَوَانِيسِ فِي رَمَضَانَ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi ukrašavaju svoje kuće fenjeriа u Ramazanu.
sentences.translationEn: People decorate their homes with lanterns during Ramadan.

sentences.translation: Fenjer je poznati simbol mjeseca Ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: The lantern is a famous symbol of the month of Ramadan.
Children carry lanterns through the streets.
